title: Luffy Returns to the Sky
description: Luffy comes back for the final exchange against Doflamingo.
scene: On pages 0–7, Luffy, King Riku, Rebecca, Viola, Trafalgar Law move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Maybe you can see the same thing you have not even have the time to come down.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The final minute of fate begins now! *

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: At this rate, the central district's mere inches from being made into minemeat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Even the Royal Plateau's started getting carved up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm in everyone's debt... for what you've done.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Had you not been here, there's no telling how many thousands... how many tens of thousands of lives we'd have lost by now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Put your backs into it! Are you gonna let this bird cage push you around!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Push this damn bird cage back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Viola- San! Please, you've done enough!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Just because you spent a decade with me as part of my family,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Did you actually think I'd hesitate?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: That I'd falter when given the chance to kill you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I do not chide my allies and underlings when they fail.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: I do not look kindly upon Betrayal.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: No, stop! What am... I doing!?

summary: This part focuses on luffy returns to the sky, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
